name: Rhubarb Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cut-up rhubarb, sugar, and orange rind in a bowl. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda. Add the oatmeal and mix well to combine.
3. Cream the margarine and brown sugar until smooth. Gradually add the oatmeal and flour mixture, mixing until just combined.
4. Spread half of the dough into a greased 11 x 7 inch pan. Arrange the rhubarb mixture on top. Sprinkle the remaining crumbs evenly over the bars.
5. Press down gently to ensure even distribution throughout the bars.
6. Bake at 400°F for 35 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
